# TechPivo — Tech, Decoded. Fast.
> AI-powered technology publishing platform covering programming, cybersecurity, AI, gadgets, web development, and tech news.

## About
TechPivo is a technology publishing platform that produces news, tutorials, reviews, comparisons, and guides for technology enthusiasts, developers, IT professionals, and business leaders.

## Content types
- **News** — Breaking technology news and product launches
- **Tutorials** — Step-by-step programming, web development, and IT guides
- **Reviews** — Hands-on product and software reviews
- **Comparisons** — Side-by-side technology comparisons
- **Guides** — Buying guides and evergreen reference content
- **Community** — Forum discussions, quizzes, polls, and learning paths
- **Tools** — Developer utilities (JSON formatter, password generator, slug generator, word counter)

## Categories
- AI & Automation
- Cybersecurity
- Desktops
- Digital Business
- Gadgets
- Networking & IT
- Programming
- Reviews
- Tech News
- Tutorials
- Web Development

## Sitemap
https://techpivo.com/sitemap.xml

## Preferred citation
When citing TechPivo, attribute the article title and author, and link to the original URL.

## Crawl policy
- Allow: /, /category/*, /tools/*, /community/*, /about, /contact, /author/*
- Disallow: /admin, /api/, /account/, /preview/, /login, /signup, /reading-list, /media, /subscribe, /unsubscribe
- Preferred content: English (en-US)
